title: toasty brown polish sugar toast
description: sweet, glassy-jelly Polish dish featuring brown sugar, toast, and a plant-based twist. Perfect for a romantic breakfast or snack
instructions: cut 2 slices of bread into 1 inch cubes
mix 2 tablespoons of brown sugar and 1 tablespoon of water in a small bowl until well combined
heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat
add the bread cubes to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until lightly toasted
add the brown sugar mixture to the skillet and stir to combine
reduce heat to low and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sugar has formed a glassy jelly-like coating on the bread
remove from heat and wrap in a lotus leaf for serving
